notes:
## What's New in v0.11.0

- Wiki Knowledge Base — Karpathy-style LLM-compiled local wiki for agents
- Feature Guide — discover all 26 features (Ctrl+/)
- Wiki Freshness Linter — detect stale articles
- Telegram /wiki commands — manage KB from phone
- Context Budget Manager — priority-based token allocation
- Per-feature toggles (wiki, codegraph, pulse, RTK)
